word: H1854 - דָּקַק - dâqaq - daw-kak' - Beat in pieces

sections.paragraph:
Original: דּקק

Transliteration: dâqaq

Phonetic: daw-kak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to crush, pulverise, thresh
    1. (Qal)
      1. to crush
      2. to be fine
    2. (Hiphil) to pulverise, make dust of
    3. (Hophal) to be crushed

Origin: a primitive root [compare H1915]

TWOT entry: 448

Part(s) of speech: Verb
